# Vendored scripts

These files are verbatim mirrors of scripts from the external
`pm-analysis-code-supplement` skill, copied here for local execution
by the Python pipeline.

**Do not edit the logic in these files.** They must stay in sync with
the skill. Any changes must be coordinated with the skill — never made
unilaterally. See AGENTS.md §1.
